chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D239 of 2018: Ghulam Yasin Napar vs. Province of Sindh & others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Irfan Badar Abbasi, Advocate. For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 22.02.2022. Date of announcement: 22.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The present petition was filed in 2018 seeking reinstatement of the petitioner, where from he was allegedly terminated in 2009. At the very onset the learned counsel was confronted with the issue of laches, however, he remained unable to provide any cogent justification for the inordinate delay. In view hereof, this petition is found to be hit by laches, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
